About Us

Not a gym
A lifestyle

Lifetime Fitness Gym isn't just another fitness center in Muzaffarpur. It's a carefully crafted space where ambition, discipline, and luxury converge.

From our hand-picked equipment to our elite training staff, every detail is designed to elevate your workout into an experience. We believe fitness should feel exclusive — because your goals deserve nothing less.

Built for
champions

35+ Machines

Cardio Theater

A cinematic cardio experience with premium treadmills, ellipticals, and bikes facing a dynamic visual wall.

40+ Stations

Strength Arena

Elite strength training zone loaded with plate-loaded machines, cable systems, and power racks.

50+ Free Weights

Free Weight Zone

A dedicated space for serious lifters with dumbbells up to 60kg, Olympic platforms, and benches.
